name: similarweb
title: Similarweb
description: Fetch Similarweb-style website insights and browse stored snapshots.
author: alexi.build

commands.name: show-website-data
commands.title: Show Website Data
commands.description: Fetch Similarweb domain insights for a typed domain or the active browser tab.

commands.name: history
commands.title: History
commands.description: Browse previously fetched website snapshots stored locally.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
